name: ClawEditor Gateway Bridge
description: Intercepts channel slash commands (/edit, /aiedit, /aicorrect, /aiimport) and forwards claw_editor.v1.request to the ClawEditor holder; delivers diff/commit via channel outbound (emitV1Event).

onlyChannelIds.description: If non-empty, only handle messages whose originating channel id is in this list.

skipSessionKeySubstrings.description: If the session key contains any of these substrings (case-insensitive), do not intercept.

dropIfSlow.description: Passed to gateway broadcast (drop event for slow WebSocket consumers when true).
